mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_FEED_PREFERENCE ( USER_ID, DEFAULT_SCOPE, DEFAULT_SORT, DEFAULT_VIEW, DEFAULT_CATEGORY, LAST_DEPT_ID, LAST_SEARCH_Q ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{defaultScope}, #{defaultSort}, #{defaultView}, #{defaultCategory}, #{lastDeptId}, #{lastSearchQ} ) ON CONFLICT (USER_ID) DO UPDATE SET DEFAULT_SCOPE = EXCLUDED.DEFAULT_SCOPE, DEFAULT_SORT = EXCLUDED.DEFAULT_SORT, DEFAULT_VIEW = EXCLUDED.DEFAULT_VIEW, DEFAULT_CATEGORY = EXCLUDED.DEFAULT_CATEGORY, LAST_DEPT_ID = EXCLUDED.LAST_DEPT_ID, LAST_SEARCH_Q = EXCLUDED.LAST_SEARCH_Q, LAST_CHG_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, DEFAULT_SCOPE, DEFAULT_SORT, DEFAULT_VIEW, DEFAULT_CATEGORY, LAST_DEPT_ID, LAST_SEARCH_Q, CRT_DT, LAST_CHG_DT FROM USER_FEED_PREFERENCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT BBS_CTGR_CD FROM USER_FEED_CATEGORY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY BBS_CTGR_CD
SELECT PST_ID FROM USER_SAVED_POST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CRT_DT DESC
SELECT DISTINCT PST_ID FROM BOARD_COMMENT WHERE CRT_USER_ID = #{userId} AND COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT F.USER_ID, F.TARGET_USER_ID, U.USER_NM, U.USER_EMAIL, U.USER_TELNO, U.EXT_TEL, U.DEPT_ID, D.DEPT_NM, U.JBGD_CD, J.JBGD_NM, U.WORK_STTS_CD, C.CODE_NM AS WORK_STTS_NM, FD.FILE_PATH, F.CRT_DT FROM USER_FAVORITE_USER F INNER JOIN USERS U ON F.TARGET_USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE J ON U.JBGD_CD = J.JBGD_CD LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE C ON U.WORK_STTS_CD = C.CODE_ID LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL FD ON U.USER_IMG_FILE_ID = FD.FILE_ID WHERE F.USER_ID = #{userId} AND COALESCE(U.RSGNTN_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY F.CRT_DT DESC, U.USER_NM

SELECT T.TODO_ID, T.USER_ID, T.TARGET_USER_ID, TU.USER_NM AS TARGET_USER_NAME, D.DEPT_NM AS TARGET_DEPT_NAME, J.JBGD_NM AS TARGET_JOB_GRADE_NAME, T.TODO_TTL, T.TODO_CN, T.DONE_YN, T.DUE_DT, T.CRT_DT, T.LAST_CHG_DT FROM USER_TODO T LEFT JOIN USERS TU ON T.TARGET_USER_ID = TU.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON TU.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE J ON TU.JBGD_CD = J.JBGD_CD WHERE T.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN COALESCE(T.DONE_YN, 'N') = 'N' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, T.DUE_DT NULLS LAST, T.CRT_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_TODO ( USER_ID, TARGET_USER_ID, TODO_TTL, TODO_CN, DONE_YN, DUE_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{targetUserId}, #{todoTtl}, #{todoCn}, COALESCE(#{doneYn}, 'N'), #{dueDt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_TODO SET TARGET_USER_ID = #{targetUserId}, TODO_TTL = #{todoTtl}, TODO_CN = #{todoCn}, DONE_YN = COALESCE(#{doneYn}, 'N'), DUE_DT = #{dueDt}, LAST_CHG_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TODO_ID = #{todoId}
mapper.select: SELECT R.RECOMMEND_ID, R.FROM_USER_ID, FU.USER_NM AS FROM_USER_NAME, FD.DEPT_NM AS FROM_DEPT_NAME, R.TO_USER_ID, TU.USER_NM AS TO_USER_NAME, R.BBS_CTGR_CD, R.MESSAGE, R.ACCEPTED_YN, R.READ_YN, R.CRT_DT, R.ACCEPTED_DT FROM USER_CATEGORY_RECOMMEND R LEFT JOIN USERS FU ON R.FROM_USER_ID = FU.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT FD ON FU.DEPT_ID = FD.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN USERS TU ON R.TO_USER_ID = TU.USER_ID WHERE R.RECOMMEND_ID = #{recommendId}

SELECT R.RECOMMEND_ID, R.FROM_USER_ID, FU.USER_NM AS FROM_USER_NAME, FD.DEPT_NM AS FROM_DEPT_NAME, R.TO_USER_ID, TU.USER_NM AS TO_USER_NAME, R.BBS_CTGR_CD, R.MESSAGE, R.ACCEPTED_YN, R.READ_YN, R.CRT_DT, R.ACCEPTED_DT FROM USER_CATEGORY_RECOMMEND R LEFT JOIN USERS FU ON R.FROM_USER_ID = FU.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT FD ON FU.DEPT_ID = FD.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN USERS TU ON R.TO_USER_ID = TU.USER_ID WHERE R.TO_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY R.CRT_DT DESC

SELECT R.RECOMMEND_ID, R.FROM_USER_ID, FU.USER_NM AS FROM_USER_NAME, FD.DEPT_NM AS FROM_DEPT_NAME, R.TO_USER_ID, TU.USER_NM AS TO_USER_NAME, R.BBS_CTGR_CD, R.MESSAGE, R.ACCEPTED_YN, R.READ_YN, R.CRT_DT, R.ACCEPTED_DT FROM USER_CATEGORY_RECOMMEND R LEFT JOIN USERS FU ON R.FROM_USER_ID = FU.USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT FD ON FU.DEPT_ID = FD.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN USERS TU ON R.TO_USER_ID = TU.USER_ID WHERE R.FROM_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY R.CRT_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_CATEGORY_RECOMMEND ( FROM_USER_ID, TO_USER_ID, BBS_CTGR_CD, MESSAGE ) VALUES ( #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{bbsCtgrCd}, #{message} )
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_CATEGORY_RECOMMEND SET ACCEPTED_YN = #{acceptedYn}, READ_YN = COALESCE(#{readYn}, READ_YN), ACCEPTED_DT = CASE WHEN #{acceptedYn} = 'Y' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE ACCEPTED_DT END WHERE RECOMMEND_ID = #{recommendId}
